Our Mission

The Independent National Convention

The Flagship Gathering of the United Independent Movement

The Independent National Convention is the premier event for independents, reformers, and political outsiders. The Independent National Convention is where leaders, activists, and organizations unite to build momentum, forge coalitions, and reimagine American democracy — beyond the two-party system. Hosted at the JW Marriott Washington, DC — steps away from the White House and at the heart of the nation's capital.

Presented by

📍   JW Marriott Washington, DC
1331 Pennsylvania Ave NW, Washington, DC
★   The Independent National Convention
★   JW Marriott Rooftop · Washington, D.C.
Previous Speakers

Voices of the Movement

Robert F. Kennedy Jr.
Independent · Secretary of Health & Human Services

Former independent candidate for U.S. President and current Secretary of Health and Human Services, RFK Jr. has been a leading voice for government accountability and reform beyond the two-party system.

Tulsi Gabbard
Independent · Director of National Intelligence

Combat veteran and former Congresswoman who left the Democratic Party, Tulsi Gabbard now serves as Director of National Intelligence — one of America's most prominent independent voices.

Andrew Yang
Independent · Candidate for U.S. President

Entrepreneur and founder of the Forward Party, Andrew Yang ran for President as an independent candidate, championing a break from the two-party duopoly and putting people first.

★   Speaker lineup subject to change   ★

Convention Schedule

Three Days. One Movement.

Day One September 23, 2026
9:00 AM
★ Opening Ceremony & Keynote Address
Welcome remarks & the Independent vision for America
12:00 PM
★ Luncheon & Networking
Connect with independents from across the nation
2:00 PM
★ Panel: Breaking the Two-Party Mold
Experts and advocates discuss pathways to real change
7:00 PM
★ Evening Gala Reception
Celebrate the launch of the Independent movement
Day Two September 24, 2026
9:00 AM
★ United Independents Forum
Featured speakers address the movement's path forward
1:00 PM
★ Policy Workshops
Deep dives into healthcare, economy, and governance reform
4:00 PM
★ Independent Voices Spotlight
Citizens and candidates share their vision for America
Day Three September 25, 2026
10:00 AM
★ The Independent Platform Reveal
Unveiling the unified platform for the movement forward
2:00 PM
★ Call to Action & Organizing
Grassroots strategies and next steps nationwide
5:00 PM
★ Closing Ceremony — Together, We Rise
A unified declaration to the nation
